title: 9C: Vanilla+
description: Vanilla+ modpack with a lot of enhancement.
body:
![ninecraft promo image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u94pH80R/images/86b840049a6a86b72f5e8cbbafc72bf72359a3fb.png)

**Vanilla game experience, with many improvements such as:**
- Shaders with breathtaking visuals
- New vibrant effects that enhance and breathe life into the world of Minecraft
- Quality of life changes will make some aspects of the game more informative and appealing
- New animations and emotions make your character truly come alive
- Get rid of unnecessary programs - open your world to your friends right in the game with just one button

![modpack overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u94pH80R/images/bc737b7f7219f5c770c201c907d61392a13cb8f7.png)
